description_long: This security guard is depicted as a young adult male dressed in a sleek, modern black uniform with subtle gray paneling and detailing along the arms and torso. He wears a fitted black jacket with a high collar, matching black pants, and black gloves, giving a professional and authoritative appearance. The uniform includes a black cap with a small, round emblem at the center, and a utility belt with pouches at the waist, suggesting readiness for duty. His face is clean-shaven, and his hair is dark and neatly styled, visible beneath the cap. The gloves and boots are robust, likely made of synthetic leather or similar durable material, suitable for urban patrol. The overall look is formal, standardized, and designed for both functionality and presence in public spaces.
description: A young male security guard in a modern, all-black uniform with gloves, cap, and utility belt, exuding professionalism and readiness.
description_view_0: Front view shows the security guard's face, high-collared jacket, utility belt, gloves, and cap with emblem.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, facial features, and the layered structure of the jacket and gloves.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, pants, and cap, as well as the utility belt and overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile, glove details, and the straight posture.
attribute_uniform_type: The uniform consists of a formal, fitted black jacket with gray paneling, matching black pants, black gloves, and a black cap with a small round emblem, all designed for a standardized and professional appearance.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, projecting alertness and readiness.
